## Swarm Task: Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor

**Task ID:** s1
**Title:** Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor

Review the source code in ../claude-code-sourcemap to analyze ClaudeCode features. Identify key functionalities, user interface elements, and unique selling points. Document your findings in target/temp/swarmout/claudecode_analysis.md

You are part of a swarm team. Complete this specific task. When done, use `team_task_complete` to mark task "s1" as completed.
Focus only on your assigned task — other teammates are handling other parts.
